description: Exact moments m_1, m_2, m_3 for n=2,3,4 via 2D isotropic subspace enumeration
method: Enumerate all 2D isotropic subspaces of F_2^{2n} and all ordered bases. For each (b_1,b_2), compute t = |supp(b_1) ∩ supp(b_2)|, then m_j = E[C(t,j)] / C(2n,j).
theoretical_basis: (c_1,c_2) — first two columns of A — is uniformly distributed over all ordered bases of all 2D isotropic subspaces. Proof: symmetry + each 2D isotropic W is contained in the same number of Lagrangians.
status: Exact values confirmed. Closed form for general n remains open.
